messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao on-premises. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## API Management -> OCI API Gateway

### Mapeamento

| Azure | OCI |
|-------|-----|
| API Management | API Gateway |
| API | Deployment |
| Policy | Request/Response Transformation |
| Developer Portal | Integrated (basic) |

### OCI API Gateway Features

- Rate limiting
- Authentication (OAuth, API Key)
- Request/response transformation
- Caching
- Logging to OCI Logging

### Limitaçoes

- Developer portal menos robusto
- Menos policies que Azure

### Exemplo

```
oci api-gateway deployment create \
  --compartment-id $COMPARTMENT \
  --gateway-id $GW_ID \
  --path-prefix /api \
  --backend https://my-backend.example.com
```
